name: Fundo De Investimento Imobiliario Housi
summary: HOSI11 is a Brazilian real estate investment fund (FII) focused on investing in and developing properties for the Housi platform, a residential rental and property management company. The fund aims to provide investors with income and capital appreciation through exposure to the growing residential rental market in Brazil. HOSI11 invests in a portfolio of properties managed and operated by Housi.
